summary: Public launch is still blocked by owner-provided RPC edge, backup, Base 8453 bridge, or tester packet inputs.

findings.message: Public RPC is not ready to share.
State backup is not ready for public operation.
Base 8453 bridge readiness is not ready for external funded testing.
Bridge relayer one-shot proof is not ready.
External tester packet must remain not-shareable.
Public deployment contract is not ready.

forbiddenItems: Provider URLs that carry account tokens
token hash together with the raw token
Raw tester token in GitHub or chat

stages.title: Keep the chain and private RPC running
externalAccountsOrResources: Always-on Windows host, Linux host, or VPS
ownerMustDo: Choose the host that will stay online and keep the FlowChain node/control-plane running.

stages.title: Fill the ignored local owner env file
externalAccountsOrResources: Local ignored env file or service environment
ownerMustDo: Run the template command, fill real values only on the launch host, and point FLOWCHAIN_OWNER_ENV_FILE at that file.
ownerMustNotSend: Provider URLs that carry account tokens

stages.title: Expose repo-owned FlowChain RPC through a public HTTPS edge
externalAccountsOrResources: TLS edge, reverse proxy, or tunnel
ownerMustDo: Create DNS or a tunnel hostname for the FlowChain RPC edge.
Set exact allowed browser origins and a positive per-minute rate limit.

stages.title: Provision durable state backup storage
externalAccountsOrResources: Persistent local disk, mounted volume, or owner-managed backup directory
ownerMustDo: Create a writable persistent directory available to the FlowChain service process.
Keep the path local to the launch host or mounted as durable storage.

stages.title: Enable capped friends-and-family tester writes
externalAccountsOrResources: Owner password manager or secret store
ownerMustDo: Run the tester token setup command to create or preserve the raw bearer token in ignored local storage.
Store only its SHA-256 digest in the owner env file.
Choose a small positive per-send test-unit cap.
ownerMustNotSend: token hash together with the raw token

stages.title: Configure capped Base 8453 bridge pilot observation
externalAccountsOrResources: Base RPC provider or owner-operated Base node
ownerMustDo: Provide a Base chain 8453 HTTPS endpoint.
Provide deployed lockbox and supported-token addresses.
Choose the bootstrap from-block, confirmations, max deposit, total cap, and explicit capped-pilot acknowledgement.

stages.title: Release the external tester packet only after public gates pass
ownerMustDo: Share wallet/tester instructions only after the packet report marks external sharing ready.
Keep per-send caps low for the first pilot.
ownerMustNotSend: Raw tester token in GitHub or chat

stages.title: Run final no-secret production audit before public use
externalAccountsOrResources: None beyond the configured launch resources
ownerMustDo: Run the aggregate gates after all owner values are configured.
Do not announce public readiness until completionReady is true and the truth table has no owner blockers.

gates.label: Private L1 origin
gates.summary: The public deployment origin service is running privately in live profile before any owner TLS edge is considered shareable.

gates.label: Block production monitor
gates.summary: The deployment has recent service-monitor evidence that block height advances over multiple samples.

gates.label: Service autorecovery
gates.summary: The owner service has an autorecovery supervisor and an isolated recovery drill proving control-plane restart without touching live state.

gates.label: Windows service install
gates.summary: The owner host has a no-secret Windows install, read-only status, and safe absent-task uninstall no-op path for registering the live supervisor as a reboot-persistent scheduled task.
gates.evidence: serviceInstallValidation=passed, planDidNotMutate=True, statusCommand=True, statusDidNotMutate=True, uninstallNoop=True, liveProfileDefault=True, relayerDefaultOff=True, relayerOptIn=True, commandsPresent=True

gates.label: Public RPC edge
gates.summary: The owner TLS edge must pass endpoint, CORS, rate-limit, readiness, and response-hygiene checks before sharing.
gates.evidence: publicRpcStatus=blocked, publicRpcReady=False, validationStatus=passed, validationPassed=True, abuseStatus=passed, abusePassed=True

gates.label: State backup proof
gates.summary: The public deployment must prove the configured state backup directory can create a manifest-backed snapshot and restore it in rehearsal.

gates.label: Backup dry run
gates.summary: Backup readiness has an owner-path dry run that injects an ignored local backup path into the production backup gate and proves snapshot, retention, and restore evidence without using the owner's real directory.
gates.evidence: dryRun=passed, failedChecks=0, readiness=passed, snapshotProof=True, retention=True, restoreProof=True

gates.label: Base 8453 bridge edge
gates.summary: The public deployment must not invite bridge-funded testing until Base 8453 live and infra checks pass with owner guardrails.

gates.label: Bridge relayer queue
gates.summary: The bridge relayer has a no-broadcast one-shot path plus an isolated loop validation that checks owner guardrails, proves fresh no-secret/no-broadcast loop health, observes Base 8453 deposits with a staged cursor, filters replays, queues new credits into the running L1, waits for main-state credit evidence, records handoff-to-spendable latency, only commits the Base cursor after safe proof, and proves missing-owner-input runs plus standalone observation leave final cursor state untouched.
gates.evidence: relayer=blocked, onceChecksReady=True, onceFailedChecks=0, guardrail=passed, directObserveStagedDefault=True, directObserveCursorNotFinal=True, loopValidation=passed, loopFailedChecks=0, loopReportHealthy=True, observed=0, new=0, queued=0, applied=0, latencyGate=not-run, cursorCommitRequired=True, cursorCommitted=False, cursorReason=not-run, handoffToSpendableSeconds=

gates.label: External tester packet
gates.summary: External tester packet and machine-readable connection pack must remain not-shareable until owner public RPC, backup, and bridge gates pass, and they must rely on fresh tester-wallet evidence plus authenticated tester faucet/send gateway smoke.
gates.evidence: externalTester=blocked, localTesterRehearsalReady=True, testerNetworkFresh=True, publicTesterGatewayReady=True, faucetRoute=True, packetSmoke=True, testerFaucet=True, capRejected=True, connectPackReady=True, externalSharingReady=False, packet=blocked, packetShareable=False

gates.label: Tester write gateway
gates.summary: The public deployment has a local production-shaped proof for authenticated tester wallet creation, capped tester faucet funding, capped tester sends, balance settlement, and over-cap rejection.

gates.label: No secrets or broadcasts
gates.summary: Deployment contract and current readiness reports preserve no-secret, no-env-value, and no-live-broadcast boundaries.
